headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Healthpeak Properties, Raises Price Target to $24
summary: Mizuho  analyst Vikram Malhotra   maintains Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $21 to $24.
